title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.760 - Additional personnel of state board, appointment of
text:
162.760.  Additional personnel of state board, appointment of. — The state board of education shall appoint a section head and the other personnel to implement, effectuate and supervise programs for severely handicapped children.
(L. 1973 H.B. 474 § 21) 
Effective 7-1-74
